# Memory / Primitives PRs

Optimization recipe: Transfer primitive policy carefully: coalescing, shared-memory staging, partial tiles, and determinism are part of the contract.

NCU first look: DRAM throughput, L2 hit rate, memory sectors, shared-memory conflicts, and synchronization overhead.

## Inspection Questions

- Which primitive policy changed and how is it specialized by architecture?
- Are deterministic behavior and partial-tile behavior preserved?

## PRs

| Repo | PR | Merged | What to inspect | Ledger key |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
